capabilities.industry_semantics: Freeze the economic hypothesis, target, universe, timing, primary metric, trial family, selection sample, holdout sample, and rejection criteria before inspecting result-dependent choices.
when_to_use: at the start of every new factor hypothesis
before adding a factor, horizon, slice, transform, or parameter to the tested family
preconditions: the research question and intended China-futures universe are stated
prohibitions: do not silently redefine the primary hypothesis after seeing results
do not treat an Alpha Zoo ranking as validation

capabilities.industry_semantics: Verify that every factor operator exists and has causal, point-in-time semantics before factor evaluation.
when_to_use: before evaluating a FactorExpr
after factor source or operator-registry changes
preconditions: factor family or expression is known
prohibitions: do not infer operator semantics from a display name alone

capabilities.industry_semantics: Materialize the versioned factor source workspace used by the authoritative runtime.
when_to_use: before source inspection or factor-source modification
preconditions: authenticated FactorTester CLI is configured
prohibitions: do not edit generated or unrelated server source as a substitute for the factor workspace

capabilities.industry_semantics: Reconcile factor source, declared parameters, compiled expression tree, data fields, and operator keys.
when_to_use: before the first run
after a source or parameter change
preconditions: factor workspace is prepared
prohibitions: do not equate source-code presence with the production expression tree

capabilities.industry_semantics: Change writable factor source or parameters with a reviewable diff and rerun causal and statistical diagnostics.
when_to_use: after a research-backed factor-improvement decision
preconditions: factor-improvement reason and evidence are recorded
the operator has factor-workspace write authority
prohibitions: do not change source merely to erase an unfavorable holdout result
do not modify platform source under a factor-improvement decision

capabilities.industry_semantics: Inspect actual historical coverage and delayed, paper, or live stream reachability for the exact user-confirmed products and sources before designing samples, without treating entitlement as verified latency or point-in-time provenance.
when_to_use: after the Planning Agent confirms product and source scope
before synthesizing a TrialPlan
preconditions: the exact product identifiers and requested sources are known
prohibitions: do not expand products or fall back to another source implicitly
do not return the full provider catalog or raw probe output to the Agent

capabilities.industry_semantics: Bind every observation to source version, trading calendar, session, timezone, availability time, membership, contract identity, and checksum so future information cannot enter the signal.
when_to_use: before computing a factor panel
when joining contract, macro, inventory, fundamental, or membership data
preconditions: raw and processed dataset identities are available
prohibitions: do not use today's dominant contract mapping for historical dates
do not discard contract lifecycle fields to fit a narrow OHLCV view

capabilities.industry_semantics: Align data visibility, signal timestamp, forward-return horizon, and the next tradable execution bar without look-ahead.
when_to_use: for every factor panel and each tested holding horizon
when changing bar frequency or session rules
preconditions: field availability and exchange session semantics are known
prohibitions: do not trade on the same close used to compute a close-based signal unless an executable timing proof exists

capabilities.industry_semantics: Separate selection from holdout evidence and define rolling, calendar, and regime slices before result-dependent selection.
when_to_use: before submitting a research run
preconditions: sample bounds and intended selection role are known
prohibitions: do not use holdout slices for model or parameter selection

capabilities.industry_semantics: Create the durable owner of one editable research configuration and its provenance.
when_to_use: after preflight semantics and slice design pass
preconditions: factor identities and configuration inputs are known
prohibitions: do not use a UI page identifier as the research lifecycle owner

capabilities.industry_semantics: Freeze an immutable RunSpec containing universe, product mask, factor aliases, dates, costs, capacity, margin, fees, rollover, timing, sample role, slices, and tested-grid metadata.
when_to_use: immediately before execution
after any configuration revision
preconditions: all effective settings are explicit
prohibitions: do not rely on silent defaults for allocation, fee, margin, timing, or rollover semantics

capabilities.industry_semantics: Submit requested analyses against one immutable RunSpec and retain stable run and job identities.
when_to_use: after configuration freeze and capability resolution
preconditions: all mandatory capabilities are bound or explicitly waived by audit
prohibitions: do not bypass the authoritative FactorTester execution path for China-futures conclusions

capabilities.industry_semantics: Observe durable job state, progress, attempts, errors, results, and artifacts without conflating transport loss with research failure.
when_to_use: while an authoritative run is executing
when resuming an interrupted Agent session
preconditions: job identity exists
prohibitions: do not infer completion from a disconnected UI or stream

capabilities.industry_semantics: Cancel or retry an identified job while retaining attempt lineage and partial evidence.
when_to_use: after an explicit stop condition or retryable operational failure
preconditions: job identity and current state are known
prohibitions: do not discard completed unaffected jobs when one branch is paused

capabilities.industry_semantics: Measure date-wise cross-sectional rank association between a point-in-time factor and future returns, reporting coverage, mean IC, uncertainty, stability, and horizon decay.
when_to_use: after causal alignment and before expensive portfolio simulation
preconditions: a multi-product point-in-time panel and forward-return definition exist
prohibitions: do not interpret one aggregate IC as sufficient evidence
do not pool unavailable or stale products as valid zeros

implementations.limitation: does not provide the full China-futures uncertainty, FDR, OOS, cost, and accounting contract

capabilities.industry_semantics: Test whether ordered factor portfolios produce economically ordered outcomes with sufficient cross-sectional breadth, turnover disclosure, and stable direction.
when_to_use: alongside IC for cross-sectional factors
preconditions: factor direction and grouping policy are frozen
prohibitions: do not select direction or group count from holdout performance

capabilities.industry_semantics: Count every factor, transform, horizon, universe, slice, parameter, and adaptive choice in the family of attempted hypotheses.
when_to_use: before the first test and whenever the search family expands
preconditions: the primary hypothesis has been preregistered
prohibitions: do not count only the winning configurations

implementations.limitation: the deterministic ledger covers the frozen Decision Contract, TrialPlan, and RunSpec family; the Planning Agent must add prior informal, rejected, and adaptive trials that cannot be inferred from those objects

capabilities.industry_semantics: Control the expected false-discovery burden across the complete tested family and report both raw and adjusted evidence.
when_to_use: when more than one factor, horizon, transform, slice, or parameter participates in selection
preconditions: the complete trial family and dependence assumptions are recorded
prohibitions: do not apply correction only to the surviving subset

implementations.limitation: Bonferroni and Benjamini-Hochberg guidance requires the complete trial ledger and explicit dependence caveats; it does not manufacture p-values for backtest-only outcomes

capabilities.industry_semantics: Estimate Sharpe uncertainty with a resampling scheme that preserves relevant serial dependence, regime structure, and the exact return construction.
when_to_use: after a viable net return series exists
when asymptotic Sharpe uncertainty is questionable
preconditions: return frequency, dependence, block rule, and resample count are declared
prohibitions: do not independently shuffle autocorrelated returns
do not use bootstrap output to conceal the number of attempted strategies

implementations.limitation: generic examples are not a reviewed FactorTester implementation

capabilities.industry_semantics: Evaluate whether observed Sharpe exceeds the selection-bias and non-normality-adjusted benchmark implied by the number and dependence of trials.
when_to_use: after selecting among multiple strategies or configurations
preconditions: trial ledger, sample length, return skewness, kurtosis, and candidate Sharpe distribution are available
prohibitions: do not substitute an unadjusted Sharpe threshold

capabilities.industry_semantics: Estimate selection-induced out-of-sample degradation using combinatorially symmetric cross-validation when a sufficiently complete strategy matrix exists.
when_to_use: for a material grid or strategy-selection exercise where CSCV assumptions can be met
preconditions: all candidate return paths over common partitions are retained
prohibitions: do not run CSCV on only the selected winner
do not treat PBO as a replacement for a true holdout

evidence_sources.topic: CSCV and probability of backtest overfitting

capabilities.industry_semantics: Replay China-futures positions with effective-dated contract multiplier, fees, intraday-close rules, margin, settlement, price limits, sessions, capacity, expiry, delivery, and rollover semantics.
when_to_use: for every net performance conclusion
after a factor survives cheap diagnostics
preconditions: contract-level market and rule histories are bound to the RunSpec
prohibitions: do not use one static fee or margin table across history without proof
do not use Vibe generic defaults as authoritative China-futures evidence

evidence_sources.topic: effective-dated fee changes and intraday close fees

implementations.limitation: simplified sessions and product defaults are unsuitable for authoritative replay

capabilities.industry_semantics: Explain realized returns by factor, product, sector, regime, timing, turnover, carry, rollover, and residual sources using an appropriate benchmark.
when_to_use: after an economically viable net backtest
when hidden beta or concentrated contribution is suspected
preconditions: positions, trades, returns, benchmark, and exposure histories are available
prohibitions: do not use equity Brinson attribution unchanged for a futures strategy
do not interpret attribution as prediction

implementations.limitation: predominantly equity examples; futures-specific attribution is not implemented

capabilities.industry_semantics: Measure drawdown, tail loss, liquidity, concentration, margin-call, limit-move, and historical scenario risk without assuming normal independent returns.
when_to_use: after authoritative position and return paths exist
before a production-readiness decision
preconditions: position, collateral, margin, and liquidity histories are available
prohibitions: do not apply square-root-of-time scaling without validating dependence
do not omit forced-liquidation and limit-move scenarios

implementations.limitation: generic VaR examples are not an authoritative China-futures margin stress engine

capabilities.industry_semantics: Inspect external formula libraries for prior art, required fields, timing operators, provenance, and duplicate hypotheses without treating catalog rank as evidence of validity.
when_to_use: when a hypothesis begins from an external formula library
when checking whether a proposed formula has already been tested
preconditions: factor identity and formula provenance can be retained
prohibitions: do not batch-screen the full zoo by default
do not infer product validity from formula compatibility
do not bypass the authoritative validation backend

capabilities.industry_semantics: Select a source that satisfies the selected product profile, field, frequency, availability-time, license, authentication, and reproducibility contract, with explicit fallback and provenance.
when_to_use: when required data is absent from the authoritative local contract
when external data is needed for hypothesis formation
preconditions: product group, field semantics, frequency, and point-in-time requirements are explicit
prohibitions: do not substitute a convenient OHLCV source for missing contract semantics
do not hide source fallback or authentication failure

capabilities.industry_semantics: Diagnose stationarity, cointegration, residual dependence, lag structure, and model assumptions before interpreting level, spread, or predictive time-series relations.
when_to_use: when a factor thesis uses price levels or spreads
when regression residuals or predictive lag relations drive the hypothesis
preconditions: series alignment and economic direction are specified
prohibitions: do not equate Granger predictability with structural causality
do not use fixed p-value thresholds without recording the tested family

capabilities.industry_semantics: Evaluate session boundaries, timestamp ordering, spread, depth, volume, liquidity, price limits, and execution feasibility for intraday signals.
when_to_use: when signal frequency is intraday
when the thesis depends on order flow, volume, spread, or market impact
preconditions: exchange session and timestamp conventions are explicit
prohibitions: do not reuse equity or crypto session defaults for another product profile
do not infer fillability from bar OHLCV alone

evidence_sources.topic: cross-market spread, liquidity, and trading-hours review dimensions
China-futures price limits, margin changes, and position controls

implementations.limitation: reuse cross-market spread, depth, volume, liquidity, timing, and impact dimensions, but resolve sessions, contract roll, tick size, limits, margin, fees, settlement, and fillability from the China-futures product profile; retain unknowns when only bars are available
generic data and fee examples are not product-profile authority

capabilities.industry_semantics: Combine multiple factors under frozen normalization, direction, weighting, missing-value, exposure, and collinearity rules, counting every adaptive combination as a trial.
when_to_use: when two or more factors are normalized, selected, or weighted together
preconditions: component factors have distinct identities and point-in-time panels
prohibitions: do not optimize weights on holdout data
do not hide correlated variants as independent discoveries

capabilities.industry_semantics: Model explicit fees and implicit spread, slippage, delay, participation, impact, limit-move, and opportunity costs at the product profile's execution grain.
when_to_use: when turnover or participation is material
when intraday execution or market impact can change the conclusion
preconditions: orders or position changes, liquidity, and effective fee rules are available
prohibitions: do not use generic fixed basis-point defaults as authoritative evidence
do not report gross performance as net

implementations.limitation: market examples and defaults require product-specific review

capabilities.industry_semantics: Generate testable commodity hypotheses from supply, inventory, term structure, carry, seasonality, and macro mechanisms while preserving publication-time and contract semantics.
when_to_use: when the factor thesis explicitly depends on commodity fundamentals, curve structure, inventory, or seasonality
preconditions: data publication timing and futures contract mapping can be obtained
prohibitions: do not turn generic thresholds or narrative scores into validated signals without preregistration and backtesting

capabilities.industry_semantics: Distinguish missing platform capability, unavailable approved implementation, invalid data contract, research rejection, and operational failure before choosing a branch.
when_to_use: when a required capability cannot bind or a command fails
preconditions: failed requirement, command, evidence, and current graph node are recorded
prohibitions: do not relabel a platform gap as a failed factor
do not auto-install or execute a discovered skill

capabilities.industry_semantics: Search installed and external skill inventories for an implementation matching a missing semantic capability, then quarantine the candidate until review.
when_to_use: after capability-gap classification confirms no approved binding exists
preconditions: the missing capability contract and product constraints are explicit
prohibitions: do not download, install, load as executable instructions, or run a discovered skill without approval

capabilities.industry_semantics: Package a repeatedly needed, reviewed workflow as a validated skill whose triggers, resources, scope, and safety boundaries are explicit.
when_to_use: after a capability gap is accepted for implementation and the function is reusable as guidance or a bounded tool workflow
preconditions: grill audit approves the capability and implementation scope
tests or validation fixtures exist
prohibitions: do not create a skill to hide a missing authoritative backend
do not activate the new skill without approval

capabilities.industry_semantics: Challenge a proposed graph edge, skill binding, or platform change against industry semantics, counterexamples, evidence sufficiency, scope, and token cost before activation.
when_to_use: before activating a new edge
before approving skill installation or execution
before authorizing a platform code change
preconditions: proposal, evidence, counterexamples, affected jobs, and rollback plan are available
prohibitions: do not let the proposing Agent be the only reviewer for a material graph change

capabilities.industry_semantics: Audit provenance, configuration, causal timing, trial counts, raw and adjusted statistics, gross-to-net performance, accounting, artifacts, failure evidence, and unresolved gaps before a decision.
when_to_use: after diagnostics or backtests finish
before any factor-validity or graph-change proposal
preconditions: applicable diagnostic command or run/job identity, artifact, configuration, data, and graph references are retained
prohibitions: do not allow an executor to self-declare factor validity
do not suppress failed or null experiments

capabilities.industry_semantics: Derive material, falsifiable, factor-specific Verification Obligations from the current Decision Contract, Claim state, evidence boundary, and first-principles alternatives without strengthening a Claim.
when_to_use: when a Contract or Claim is first initialized
when evidence or semantic review exposes a material untracked question
preconditions: current Decision Contract and compact Claim/obligation checkpoint are available
prohibitions: do not apply a universal checklist
do not convert a new question into empirical Claim support

capabilities.industry_semantics: Select an actionable Verification Obligation and freeze a TrialPlan whose outcomes, samples, alternatives, multiplicity, stopping rules, identities, and resource boundary can resolve it.
when_to_use: when an open material obligation has a feasible authoritative test
preconditions: the obligation and current Contract scope are known
required backend capability is available
prohibitions: do not create a TrialPlan for every obligation
do not select outcome rules after seeing results

capabilities.industry_semantics: Interpret factual EvidenceEnvelope v2 through a bounded Decision Warrant and propose atomic paired Claim-evidence and obligation deltas plus one next action; only an accepted authority-bearing decision may authorize the server-derived route.
when_to_use: when current factual evidence may change Claim or obligation state
preconditions: current v2 evidence, checkpoint, Contract, TrialPlan when applicable, and methodology identities are available
prohibitions: do not treat an EvidenceEnvelope as a decision
do not read or reuse legacy EvidenceEnvelope v1

capabilities.industry_semantics: Assess whether the bounded TrialPlan and obligation frontier is exhausted, blocked, resource-stopped, unsupported, or decision-ready, and require an independent closure challenge with re-entry predicates.
when_to_use: when no further meaningful obligation or TrialPlan is currently proposed
preconditions: current projection hashes, attempted trials, remaining unknowns, discovery lenses, and resource boundary are available
prohibitions: do not equate having no idea with exhaustion
do not close with unresolved decision-blocking obligations

capabilities.industry_semantics: Describe a provider-neutral methodology change, identify affected Decision Contracts deterministically, estimate token and backend cost, and propose selective reopening with validation and rollback evidence.
when_to_use: when repeated omissions, new evidence, statistical guidance, Graph semantics, or backend corrections may change the research method
preconditions: semantic diff, evidence, counterexamples, validation, compatibility, and rollback target are available
prohibitions: do not persist concrete Skill identity on the server
do not stop unaffected branches or Jobs
